retrieved_result: The screenplay of Fantastic Beasts is a rare miss for the wizarding world JK Rowling The screenplay of Fantastic Beasts is a rare miss for the wizarding world JK Rowling’s little dictionary of animals has spawned a huge film franchise, with all the attendant merchandise.
